reasoning: Initial observation suggests a relationship between voltage, current, and resistance. To confirm the relationship, I will increase the current and observe the effect on voltage.
Increasing the current resulted in a proportional increase in voltage. This supports Ohm's Law, which states V = IR. I will now decrease the current to confirm the relationship.

The relationship between voltage, current, and resistance has been confirmed to be proportional based on the observations. Decreasing the current back to its original value confirms the consistency of the relationship. The final equation can now be stated.
